description_long: This is a medium-sized red onion with a teardrop shape, featuring a smooth, slightly glossy outer skin that is predominantly a deep reddish-purple color. The bulb is mostly continuous and unsegmented, with subtle vertical striations and a few darker patches visible on some sides. The top of the onion shows a small, dried stem remnant, while the base is rounded and lacks visible roots. The papery outer skin is mostly intact, with some minor peeling and natural blemishes, especially on one side. The surface texture appears firm but not hard, with a slight sheen that suggests freshness. No green shoots or sprouting stems are visible, and the onion is isolated against a plain background with no urban elements present.
description: A medium-sized, teardrop-shaped red onion with a smooth, glossy, mostly intact outer skin and no visible roots or shoots. The surface shows some natural blemishes and subtle striations.
description_view_0: This view highlights the onion's rounded side with a slight blemish and the dried stem remnant at the top.
description_view_1: This view shows the onion's smooth, unblemished side and the intact papery skin, with the stem remnant visible at the top.
description_view_2: This view displays a glossy, mostly unblemished surface with a small dark spot and the stem remnant at the top.
description_view_3: This view reveals the most blemished side, with darker patches and a partially peeled area of the papery skin.
attribute_bulb_segmentation: The bulb appears as a single continuous structure with no distinct lobes or segments visible; subtle vertical striations are present.
attribute_papery_outer_skin: The papery outer skin is mostly intact, with minor peeling and blemishes; it is reddish-purple and has a slightly glossy texture.
attribute_root_tuft: No root tuft is present; the base is smooth and rounded with no visible roots.
attribute_green_shoot_presence: No green shoots or sprouting stems are visible.
attribute_location_relative_to_urban_ele: The onion is isolated against a plain background with no visible urban elements, surfaces, or structures.
